objective: Rebuild symbol detector baseline on a shared page-level eval and stop treating crop refiner as the main path.

baseline_candidates.name: symbol_yolov8n_seg_rect_v27
baseline_candidates.role: best known local YOLO-style detector baseline

baseline_candidates.name: symbol_yolo11n_recall_v24
baseline_candidates.role: higher precision but lower matched count than seg_rect_v27

baseline_candidates.name: symbol_yolo_p2_transfer_recall_v24
baseline_candidates.role: transfer baseline with stronger recall than early v22

comparison_target: v45 page refiner and new detector baselines must be evaluated on the same compact page-level eval protocol.

notes: Use FloorPlanCAD as the main external bbox/type source.
Use CubiCasa-derived symbol assets only as raster supervision, not runtime geometry.
Keep smoke_v30 / smoke splits for fast iteration before any locked run.

suppression_policy_target.current_problem: candidate inflation remains too high and duplicate/support negatives are not being resolved structurally
suppression_policy_target.expected_next_step: learned listwise suppression on top of detector boxes
